team_match_rule: 1 match produces exactly 2 team-match rows: one row for each participating team.

target_metrics.name: team_xg
target_metrics.description: Sum of shot xG for the team in one match.

target_metrics.name: shots
target_metrics.description: Number of team shots in one match.

target_metrics.name: xg_per_shot
target_metrics.description: team_xg divided by shots; null if shots is zero.

target_metrics.name: passes
target_metrics.description: Number of team pass events in one match.

target_metrics.name: pass_completion_rate
target_metrics.description: Completed passes divided by all passes; null if passes is zero.

target_metrics.name: pressures
target_metrics.description: Number of team pressure events in one match.

target_metrics.name: counterpressures
target_metrics.description: Number of team counterpressure events in one match.

target_metrics.name: duels
target_metrics.description: Number of team duel events in one match.

target_metrics.name: long_ball_share
target_metrics.description: Long passes divided by all passes; null if passes is zero.
